article_meta.title: Ukraine expected to give up land, some arms under US peace plan, sources sayBy Tom Balmforth and Anastasiia MalenkoNovem

reasoning: Correct Center classification for a neutral Reuters news report, but the model violated the attribution rule by citing quoted/source-attributed language as key evidence and showed slight overconfidence.
